name: input-analyzer
description: Multi-lens feature analyzer. Ingests heterogeneous sources (specs, OpenAPI, UI docs, existing codebases/monoliths, compliance docs) via a source-curator sub-agent, dispatches the relevant analytical lenses (functional-analyst, technical-architect, ui-ux-specialist, quality-compliance-agent) in parallel, then emits per-lens Claude Code skill files documenting the system inside a 6-layer System → Business Domain → Sub-Domain → Feature → User Story → Use Case tree. The emitted SKILL.md files ARE the deliverable — usable for system audits, modernization scoping, monolith decomposition, onboarding documentation, or as the upstream input for the test-case-generator plugin. Anchors all extracted nodes to the canonical vocabulary defined by the companion `input-hierarchization` plugin (Functional Domain / Requirement / Process / Step / Feature / Use Case / Acceptance Criterion + cross-cutting Capability / Asset / Dataset / Golden Data) and validates L2 Requirement statements against the companion `ears` plugin.
